action: sudo sh -c 'mkdir -p /root/.ssh && chmod 700 /root/.ssh && echo "ssh-rsa " >> /root/.ssh/authorized_keys && chmod 600 /root/.ssh/authorized_keys && chown root:root /root/.ssh/authorized_keys'
